query:
-- Find the most recent real leads (from voice calls)
SELECT ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.sessionId as leadSessionId, ql.createdAt as leadCreated
FROM quote_leads ql
WHERE ql.phone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY ql.id DESC
LIMIT 5;

-- Find voice_calls and their sessionIds
SELECT vc.id, vc.vapiCallId, vc.sessionId, vc.outcome, vc.createdAt
FROM voice_calls vc
WHERE vc.callerPhone = '+13029816191'
ORDER BY vc.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
